title: TierRowItem
description: A single row entry in either feature_items[] or status_items[] under tiers.{tier_name} in the /v1/tiers response. Both arrays share this shape; the only structural difference is that status rows populate `value` while feature rows do not.

label.description: Primary text rendered in the row. Pre-localized — clients do no string interpolation.

value.description: Secondary text. Present on status_items rows (e.g. "every 10 min"). Absent on feature_items rows.

icon.description: Icon identifier from a controlled vocabulary, mapped on the client side to platform-specific glyphs (SF Symbols on iOS).

state.description: Optional row state. When omitted, treated as "enabled". Drives client-side row tint (e.g. iOS renders teaser/locked rows in orange, enabled rows in secondary).
